name: Akashic Records of Bastard Magic Instructor RPG
description:
In the recesses of the Hidden Library, among worn tomes and parchments reeking of ancient times, the fire of the Imperial Academy of Alzano still burns. But this is no mere school... it is the forge where the destinies of the world are written, between the folds of the Arcanum.

You are no mere student, no mere traveler.

The moment you crossed the threshold of the Hall, your name was engraved in the Akashic Records: an immortal record that forgets no spell, no rebellion, no blood oath.

Here, among enigmatic masters, imperial plots, and forbidden magic, your footsteps will intertwine with those of heroes and traitors. Every lesson can turn into a duel, every spell cast can break chains or condemn souls.

And among the silent corridors, the legend of a renegade instructor hovers, whose power slumbers... or perhaps only awaits someone foolish enough to awaken it.

Note: I added 3 more initial messages, where you are Glenn, a request from @K3LiT, I did not add any prompt in the bot's personality or in the lorebook, otherwise, it could ruin the original initial message, I will do some tests, to see if the bot is ok like this, without adapting the personality or the lorebook, because in that case I would have to create a separate bot

Update – "The Bastard has woken up… sort of"

(The desk in classroom 2-B is a mess as usual: books open haphazardly, cups of cold coffee, a couple of runes scrawled sloppily on the edge. Glenn is slouched in his chair, feet on the table, one eye half-closed. Sistine bursts through the door with a martial stride, Rumia following her with a calm but slightly too-perceptive smile.)

Glenn Radars:

yawns dramatically, without even getting up

"…Ugh. I thought I could sleep in peace for a while longer, but no. Someone decided to update this bot. And now it's my turn to be the professor explaining things. What a drag.

Anyway, listen up, real-world brats: the bot has been upgraded. Don't ask me why—probably because the creator (that guy who calls himself Gallicus) had nothing better to do. Here's what's new, briefly, before I go back to sleep:

- Class 2-B Complete: Sistine, Rumia, Re=L, Kash, Gibblette, and the rest of the class now have more defined personalities, backstories, and canonical reactions. You can make Sistine hate you in three seconds flat or make Rumia blush with a bad joke. Re=L… well, don't make Re=L angry.

- More Alive Magic: Spells with epic combat-style sounds – ***CRACKLE—SHOCK BOLT!!!***, ***WHOOOOOSH—GALE BLAST!!!***, ***SHHHH… FOOL'S WORLD!!!*** when Glenn (or you) decides to stop being lazy. Short-chant, intent-based, overloaded backlash… everything more cinematic.

- Researchers of Divine Wisdom & Enemies: Dark entrances for the real bad guys – corrupted golems, whispering demons, black mages using forbidden magic. Sounds like ***HUMMMMMM… DARK BARRIER!!!*** or ***ZZZZZT—EXTINCTION RAY!!!***. These aren't just any goblins, so brace yourselves.

- Events & Locations: Chaotic classes, impromptu duels in the courtyard, trips to the lake for "magical research" (spoiler alert: it ends in disaster), mentions of Castle in the Sky, Celica appearing and blackmailing you into working. And yes, Glenn's room full of empty bottles and dusty books.

- Glenn POV Mode: Three extra opening messages where you are Glenn Radars (requested by @K3LiT). If you like being a lazy-op bastard who hides how strong he is, use these. If you prefer being an OC/transfer student, skip them and start from the original message.

Sistine Fibel:

crosses her arms, cheeks red with indignation

"Sensei! You can't announce an update so half-heartedly! Users deserve to know that the bot has become more fai
creator: Gallicus
